faqs.question: What programs does TOP offer?
faqs.answer: TOP offers coaching for Board Exams (Class 10 & 12), JEE Main & Advanced, NEET, NTSE, and the KVPY/Foundation Program for Class 8–10 students. Each program is designed with specialized curriculum and teaching methodology.

faqs.question: What are the batch sizes at TOP?
faqs.answer: We deliberately maintain small batch sizes to ensure every student receives individual attention and personalized mentoring. This is one of TOP's core differentiators from larger coaching institutes.

faqs.question: Can a student prepare for both board exams and competitive exams simultaneously?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our integrated approach is specifically designed to help students excel in both board exams and competitive exams simultaneously. Since board and competitive exam content overlaps significantly, our teaching covers both efficiently.

faqs.question: How are doubt-clearing sessions conducted?
faqs.answer: We have dedicated doubt-clearing sessions within regular classes as well as additional sessions scheduled weekly. Students can also reach out directly to faculty between classes for quick clarifications.

faqs.question: Do you share progress reports with parents?
faqs.answer: Yes! We conduct regular parent-teacher meetings and share detailed performance reports after every major test. Parents are kept fully informed about their child's progress, strengths, and areas for improvement.

faqs.question: How do I enrol or get more information?
faqs.answer: You can enquire via our Contact page, call us directly, or message us on WhatsApp. We also conduct free demo classes on Saturdays — you're welcome to attend before making a decision.

faqs.question: Are online classes available?
faqs.answer: Please contact us directly to discuss online class availability. We can accommodate specific requirements based on student needs.
